seat_diameter.description: Diameter of the round seat top

seat_radius.description: Radius of the round seat top

overall_height.description: Total height from floor to top of seat

leg_height.description: Height of each leg (floor to underside of seat)

leg_spread_radius.description: Radial distance from center to each leg center on seat underside

leg_splay_angle.description: Outward splay angle of each leg from vertical

foot_spread_radius.description: Radial distance from center to each leg center at floor level

leg_spacing_angle.description: Angular spacing between adjacent legs (4 legs at 90° apart)
